title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Amara Raja Batteries Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Amara Raja Batteries Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Amara Raja Batteries Global Group has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Jaipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Amara Raja Batteries Global Group:
Amara Raja Batteries Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amara Raja Batteries Global Group!
